name: instagram-mcp
title: Instagram MCP
description: MCP server for the Instagram Platform API (Instagram Login, no Facebook Page required) — 25 tools for profile, media, publishing (incl. Trial Reels), comments, insights, DMs, and Business Discovery.

environmentVariables.name: INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Long-lived Instagram Login access token (starts with IGAA…)

environmentVariables.name: INSTAGRAM_FB_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Facebook Graph Page token (EAA…) — enables Business Discovery and hashtag tools

environmentVariables.name: INSTAGRAM_FB_IG_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: IG Business Account ID, paired with the FB token (find via discover_fb_setup)
